snippet.title: İsmail YK - Canın Çıksın İnsafsız (2026)
snippet.description:
Canın Çıksın İnsafsız

Ağlıyorsam sebebi var
Gülmüyorsam nedeni var
Acı dolu yıllarımın
Hesabını soran var?
Kolay mıydı çekip gitmen
İnsafsızlığın günahı var

Canın çıksın insafsız
Beni vurdun zamansız
Ben sana ne yaptım ki?
Beni yaktın amansız

Yıllar geçti çok kırgınım
Yollar bitti çok yorgunum
Ne hayaldeyim gelip görsen
Çöle düşmüş bir mecnunum
Senle dolu seraplarla
Ağlayarak yok olurum

Canın çıksın insafsız
Beni vurdun zamansız
Ben sana ne yaptım ki?
Beni yaktın amansız

Şiir:
Kasırgalar yağdırdın üzerime
Umutsuzluğu ektin yüreğime
Canın çıksın insafsız
Acımadın hayallerime
Hani hayallerimiz gerçek olacaktı?
Hani aşkımız ebedi ebedi kalacaktı?
Canın çıksın, canın çıksın
İnsafsız, insafsız...

Canın çıksın insafsız....

Söz ve Müzik; Hasan Yurtseven (Yurtseven Kardeşler)
Stüdyo: YK
Aranje: İsmail YK
Yapım : Musicom Prodüksiyon
Yapımcı: Fatih Aksoylu, Harun Savaş Aksoylu
Genel Koordinatör: Murat Çağlar

snippet.title: GTA 6: Gameplay Leak! Trailer 3 & Vorbestellung - an DIESEM Tag? Neue XBOX Konsole! Leaker Statement
snippet.description:
In diesem Video geht es um die Frage, ob die GTA-6-Vorbestellung viel näher ist, als viele aktuell denken. Ich gehe auf den neuen Gameplay-Leak ein, der gerade durch die Community geht, und zeige, warum viele Fans bei dem Clip unsicher sind, während GameRoll den angeblichen Leak klar als Fälschung einordnet. Außerdem spreche ich über die neue Eilmeldung rund um den 2022-Leak, Arion Kurtaj und die Diskussion um den GTA-6-Source-Code. Dazu kommt ein Blick auf die technischen Details von GTA 6, vom RAGE-System über starke Reflexionen bis hin zu funktionierenden Seitenspiegeln, die bei vielen Fans gerade für Hype sorgen. Ein großer Teil des Videos dreht sich auch um das mögliche Marketing von Rockstar Games, die Chancen auf Trailer 3 und die Frage, ob eine Vorbestellung direkt nach dem nächsten Trailer starten könnte. Zusätzlich geht es um die Partnerschaft zwischen Rockstar Games und Sony, Gerüchte rund um 60 FPS auf der PS5 Pro, die PlayStation-IDs zu GTA 6 und weitere Hinweise, die viele aktuell als Zeichen für eine große Ankündigung sehen. Auch die Themen dynamische Preisgestaltung bei Sony, der Wolverine-Releasetermin und mögliche Rückschlüsse auf das GTA-6-Zeitfenster werden im Detail besprochen. Zum Schluss schauen wir noch auf Project Helix von Microsoft und darauf, warum der Konkurrenzkampf zwischen Xbox, PC-Hybrid-Konsole und PlayStation für GTA 6 spannend werden könnte.

Hey und willkommen! 
In meinen Videos tauchen wir tief in die Welt von GTA 6 ein und beleuchten alle aktuellen Leaks, Spekulationen und offiziellen Informationen rund um das heiß ersehnte Spiel! Wir analysieren detailliert die neuesten Gerüchte, diskutieren mögliche Schauplätze, Charaktere und Gameplay-Features und schauen uns an, welche offiziellen Fakten Rockstar Games bereits bestätigt hat. Außerdem werfen wir einen Blick auf Insider-Informationen und geben unsere Einschätzungen dazu ab, was uns in Grand Theft Auto VI erwarten könnte. Wenn du kein Detail verpassen willst, abonnier den Kanal und aktiviere die Glocke! Viel Spaß beim Zuschauen!

snippet.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles — Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Everybody's got a side hustle. 

Margo's Got Money Troubles – Coming April 15 to Apple TV https://apple.co/_MargosGotMoneyTroubles

A new series from multi-Emmy Award winner David E. Kelley starring Oscar, Emmy and Golden Globe Award nominee Elle Fanning, Golden Globe winner and Oscar and Emmy Award nominee Michelle Pfeiffer, Oscar and Emmy winner Nicole Kidman, and Emmy Award winner Nick Offerman, based on the bestselling novel by Rufi Thorpe.

“Margo’s Got Money Troubles” is a bold, heartwarming and comedic family drama following recent college dropout and aspiring writer, Margo (Fanning), the daughter of an ex-Hooter’s waitress (Pfeiffer) and ex-pro wrestler (Offerman), as she’s forced to make her way with a new baby, a mounting pile of bills and a dwindling amount of ways to pay them. The series also stars Academy Award winner Marcia Gay Harden, Academy Award nominee and Emmy Award winner Greg Kinnear, Michael Angarano, Rico Nasty and Lindsey Normington.

“Margo’s Got Money Troubles” is produced for Apple TV by A24. Kelley serves as showrunner and writer, and executive produces alongside Elle Fanning, Dakota Fanning and Brittany Kahan Ward for Lewellen Pictures; Kidman and Per Saari of Blossom Films; and Matthew Tinker for David E. Kelley Productions. Pfeiffer, Thorpe, Eva Anderson and Boo Killebrew also executive produce. BAFTA and Emmy Award winner Dearbhla Walsh directs the pilot and serves as an executive producer. Additional directors include Kate Herron and Alice Seabright.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.description:

Pre-order 'Whatever's Clever!': http://charlieputh.lnk.to/whateversclever

Credits:

Hikaru Team: Michael Martin 
Hikaru Glam: @kominehi 

Seamstress: Amy Fulcher
Styling Asst: Abi Wood
PA’s: Ditte Ravn, Max Eatherdon, Lewis Adams

Lyrics:

V1
Through the rose colored lenses
And the white picket fences
No matter how good this is
It could never satisfy
When it’s you that I’m missing
Now I sit in the kitchen
Through the window pane I
Watch the day, turn to night
P1
It ain’t a mystery
That every time you leave
That’s when I feel the most alone oh
C1
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go,
It feels so cold without the soul,
You’re the one who makes this house a home.
V2
一人の時間も大事 (Time alone is also precious)
誰にも妥協せず (Not compromising to anyone)
私だけのお城を築いた (I built my very own castle)
But it’s you I was missing
君に毎日ただいまと言わせてください (Please let me say “I’m home” to you every day)
P2
行ってらしゃい (Have a good day An everyday phrase in Japanese you say to your family when they leave the house)
君がいないこの家わ好きじゃない (I don’t like this house without you in it)
C2
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go
夏でも凍えちゃいそう (I fear I may freeze even in summer)
君の温もりがhome (Your warmth is home)
BRIDGE
It ain’t a mystery
That every time you leave
That’s when I feel the most alone
当たり前になりそうな時 (when it’s about to be taken for granted)
思い出してほしい (I hope you’ll remember)
C3
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go,
It feels so cold without the soul,
You’re the one who makes this house a home.
ある日楽園で目が覚めても (even if i wake up in paradise one day)
君がいなきゃ長居しないね (wihtout you there I wouldn’t stay long)
どんなごうてい手に入れったて (Even if i owned a dream mansion)
君がいなきゃハリボテ同然 (wihtout you there it would be a mere facade)
(Hikaru) You’re the one
(Charlie)
(Unison) You’re the one

snippet.title: HEAVENLY JUMPSTYLE (Slowed)
snippet.description:
HEAVENLY JUMPSTYLE (Slowed) · TWXNY · Sxilwix · Innxcence

(Lyrics):
Stay with me (stay with me)
Please don't leave (please don't leave)
Say you need me, need me
'Cause I can't breathe, can't breathe
Stay with me (stay with me)
Don't let go (don't let go)
If you leave me, leave me, leave
I'll be alone, alone
Left with the light on, hoping you'd call
Talking to shadows on my wall
Told all my friends I'm doing fine
Truth is I'm broken all the time
Coffee goes cold, your name on my tongue
Every old love song sounds like us
Checked my phone, nothing from you
How did forever fade so soon?
If you don't love me, say it, say it
Stay with me (stay with me)
Stay with me (stay with me)
Please don't leave (please don't leave)
Say you need me, need me
'Cause I can't breathe, can't breathe
Stay with me (stay with me)
Don't let go (don't let go)
If you leave me, leave me, leave
I'll be alone, alone
Hangs by the door
Count the cracks across the floor
Every "we'll talk" turned into air
You were beside me, now you're not there
All of our plans in cardboard dreams
Packed in a box that no one sees
I play our nights back frame by frame
Searching for when you slipped away
Stay with me (stay with me)
Please don't leave (please don't leave)
Say you need me, need me
'Cause I can't breathe, can't breathe
Stay with me (stay with me)
Don't let go (don't let go)
If you leave me, leave me, leave
I'll be alone, alone
'Lone, alone
'Lone, alone
'Lone, alone
'Lone, alone

DIRECTED BY: Rouslan Kortschagin
DOP & EDITOR: Rouslan Kortschagin
LIGHT OPERATOR: Amir Taheery

PRODUCTION: Deca Flex Media

MAKE-UP: Teresa Hofmeister
STYLING:
VFX & TITLE DESIGN: F8 STUDIOS
DANCER: Niklas Pick

THANKS TO HAVELSTUDIOS & DIZI RENTAL



Lyrics: 

Hab gehört du bist ein Astronaut 
Hast du vielleicht bisschen Sternenstaub 
Lass mich mal ziehen, ist das hier erlaubt? 
Bevor man mir jede Hoffnung raubt 
Du siehst mich nicht, doch ich bin da für dich 
Bei dir ist dunkel, komm ich geb dir Licht 
Ich bin da für dich  
Ja, ich bin da für dich 

Da ist was Großes, das uns beschützt 
Irgendwie, irgendwo, irgendwann 
Kommen wir alle bei dir an  
Und man erzählt sich, mit ganz viel Glück 
Irgendwie, irgendwo, irgendwann 
Kommen wir alle 
Insterstellar  
Insterstellar  
Zwischen den Sternen 
Wieder zusammen 
Interstellar  
Interstellar  
Zwischen den Sternen 
Irgendwie, irgendwo, irgendwann 
Kommen wir alle da zusammen 

Jeder weiß ich bin ein Astronaut 
Silberne Maske auf meiner Jacke drauf  
Ich winke lachend aus dem Shuttle raus 
Ein hoch auf das Leben, mach mal ne Flasche auf 
Ich häng hier oben bei den Sternen rum 
Denn bei euch da unten ist es viel zu laut 
Wir werden dumm, wir verlernen uns 
Und bevor wir‘s merken sind wir wieder Staub 
Wenn du Hunger hast, komm und iss von meinem Teller 
Wenn es regnet, come under my umbrella 
Ich bin dieses helle Licht in dem dunklen Keller 
Und eines schönen Tages bin ich wieder Interstellar
